subtasks.description: Evaluate emergency access request for u_9981 (senior-engineer) to db-payments-primary against access control policies. Verify on-call status, role-based permissions, incident severity (P1), and generate approval decision with audit trail requirements.

plan.cost_rationale: Single policy_action subtask at mid tier. This is an explicit governance decision requiring policy evaluation: the query asks for emergency access approval, which requires checking access control policies, role-based permissions, incident severity thresholds, and on-call status against the policy registry. Mid tier is appropriate because the decision involves multiple signals (role, incident severity, on-call status) and may require evaluating multiple applicable rules (general access control + emergency escalation exceptions). No cross_recon needed since we're evaluating policy, not reconciling operational state. No additional subtasks needed—the policy evaluation itself generates the approval decision.

output.reason: Emergency access granted under P1 incident exception. User has senior-engineer role with active P1 incident ticket (INC-20241215-0042). POL-502 dual-approval requirement waived for declared P1 incidents. POL-503 audit and review requirements apply.
applied_constraints: access_duration: limited to 4 hours or incident resolution, whichever is first
audit_logging: all queries and database modifications must be logged
incident_tracking: access tied to ticket INC-20241215-0042
review_requirement: mandatory security review within 24 hours
access_scope: read_write limited to db-payments-primary only
session_monitoring: real-time monitoring of active session required
